description_long: This is a modern, two-seater couch with a boxy, geometric silhouette and clean lines. The upholstery is a solid, dark gray fabric that covers the entire exterior, including the seat, backrest, and armrests. The couch features two large, rectangular seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be attached and slightly overstuffed for comfort. The armrests are straight, wide, and extend from the base to the height of the backrest, giving the couch a sturdy and substantial appearance. The legs are short and barely visible, suggesting a low-profile design that sits close to the ground. The overall look is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or apartment living rooms.
description: A modern, boxy two-seater couch in solid dark gray fabric with straight armrests and attached cushions. The design is minimalist and low-profile, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat cushions, two matching backrest cushions, and straight, wide armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the straight profile of the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a continuous, flat back with no visible seams or decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the straight armrest and cushion thickness seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached seat cushions and two matching attached backrest cushions; no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or patterns.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are short, block-style, and mostly hidden beneath the base, likely made of wood or plastic.
attribute_armrest_design: Armrests are straight, wide, and extend from the seat base to the top of the backrest, fully upholstered in the same fabric.
attribute_backrest_type: Backrest is high, divided into two attached cushions, and appears slightly overstuffed for comfort.
